{{Quote|Mount up.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] ordering his troops|<ref name="Clone Wars Chapter 8">{{CW|8}}</ref>}}
'''Clone lancer troopers''' were [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] who specialized in [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] combat.

==History==
Deployed early in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], they rode special [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech]] [[105-K lancer bike]]s and wielded [[Verpine power-lance]]s. Lancer troopers gained notoriety under the leadership of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] at the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]], where they faced off against [[Durge/Legends|Durge]] and his speeder bike-mounted [[IG lancer droid/Legends|IG lancer combat droids]]. Both contingents then proceeded to destroy one another until only Kenobi, a few clone lancers and Durge were left. Lancer troopers were also used to overwhelm the droid front lines. Their bikes sometimes had heat-seeking missiles equipped. They were one of the few clone troopers to have a melee weapon.
